items.title: 10-ai-careers-roadmap
items.summary: Free, structured learning library for 10 AI careers paying $135K-$1M+ in 2026. Companion to the @exploraX_ article.
items.summary_cn: 2026年，为10个人工智能职业提供免费的结构化学习库，费用为13.5万至100万美元以上。@ exploraX_文章的伴侣。
items.comment: 开源是好事，能不能用起来、改起来，才是衡量价值的标准。

items.title: vector-as-memory
items.summary: AI memory that actually learns. Zero API keys, zero GPU, zero cloud. ~800 lines of Python.
items.summary_cn: 实际学习的人工智能记忆。零API密钥、零GPU、零云。约800行Python。
items.comment: 监管落地对行业是双刃剑，合规成本飙升，小玩家可能被挤出市场。

items.title: RoboTTT: Context Scaling for Robot Policies
items.title_cn: RoboTTT ：机器人策略的上下文缩放
items.summary: Recent robot foundation models operate with single-step or short-history visuomotor context. We introduce Test-Time-Training Robot Policies (RoboTTT), a robot model and training recipe that scale visuomotor context to 8K timesteps, three orders of magnitude beyond state-of-the-art policies, without ...
items.summary_cn: 最近的机器人基础模型在单步或短历史的视觉运动环境中运行。我们推出了测试时间训练机器人策略（ RoboTTT ） ，这是一种机器人模型和训练配方，可将视觉运动上下文扩展到8K时间步长，比最先进的策略高出三个数量级，...
items.comment: AI 模型迭代快得飞起，有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: SciDiagramEdit: Learning to Edit Scientific Diagrams from Paper Revisions
items.title_cn: SciDiagramEdit ：学习从论文修订版中编辑科学图表
items.summary: Editing the figures in a research paper is a routine and time-consuming part of everyday research practice: authors relabel components, rearrange panels, and restyle visuals as they revise their manuscripts. Automating this editing workflow under a natural-language instruction, however, is challengi...
items.summary_cn: 编辑研究论文中的数字是日常研究实践的常规和耗时的部分：作者在修改手稿时重新标记组件、重新排列面板和重新设计视觉效果。然而，在自然语言指导下自动执行此编辑工作流程具有挑战性...
items.comment: 监管落地对行业是双刃剑，合规成本飙升，小玩家可能被挤出市场。

items.title: Pretraining Data Can Be Poisoned through Computational Propaganda
items.title_cn: 预训练数据可能会通过计算宣传被毒化
items.summary: Poisoning pretraining data can introduce harmful behaviors to LMs that are difficult to detect and mitigate. Prior work on poisoning pretraining data has largely exploited established data sources such as Wikipedia, which do not represent the large scale and heterogeneity typical of pretraining corp...
items.summary_cn: 中毒预训练数据可能会给LM带来难以检测和缓解的有害行为。之前关于中毒预训练数据的工作在很大程度上利用了维基百科等已建立的数据源，这些数据源并不代表预训练公司典型的大规模和异构性...
items.comment: GitHub 上的新玩具，先 fork 再说，说不定哪天就成神器了。

items.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out
items.title_cn: Neil Rimer认为人工智能资金正在流出
items.summary: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed, voluntarily or involuntarily.
items.summary_cn: 共同创立Index Ventures的风险投资家尼尔·里默（ Neil Rimer ）预测，人工智能在硅谷创造的历史性财富将不得不自愿或非自愿地重新分配。
items.comment: API 上线了，功能强大但按量付费，小团队用前要算好账。

items.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
items.title_cn: Vertu希望高管为AI代理支付$ 6,880 —以下是它的实际表现
items.summary: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.
items.summary_cn: 从人工智能工作流程到电池寿命和安全性，以下是每天与Vertu的豪华可折叠产品一起生活的真实感受。
items.comment: 监管落地对行业是双刃剑，合规成本飙升，小玩家可能被挤出市场。

items.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
items.title_cn: Databricks的估值达到1880亿美元，扩大了其作为人工智能最受欢迎的第二幕的运行
items.summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.
items.summary_cn: Databricks已将其形象重塑为一家人工智能公司，并发表了关于用于编码的开放式权重人工智能模型的成本节约的研究。
items.comment: 商业模型再升级，功能看着牛，钱包要捂紧。

items.summary: Kaiser nurses say AI, workplace surveillance are making their jobs, care worse
items.summary_cn: 凯撒护士说，人工智能、工作场所监控正在使他们的工作和护理变得更糟

items.summary_cn: 美国联邦航空局允许波音再次签署737 MAX、787适航证书
